evals.name: skillopt-like-optimization
evals.prompt: 請用 SkillOpt 的思路幫我優化這個既有 skill，要求有 baseline、validation gate 和 rollback path。
evals.expected_output: 載入 skill-optimizer，產出 optimization spec、資料切分、candidate edits、gate results 與 adoption decision。
expectations: 區分 optimizer proposal 與採納決策。
包含 train / validation / test 或 held-out split。
不直接覆蓋現有 skill。

evals.name: benchmark-improve-existing-skill
evals.prompt: I have old and new runs for this agent skill. Decide whether the new skill should be adopted based on held-out evals and cost.
evals.expected_output: Use skill-optimizer to compare baseline and candidate with validation/test/ROI gates and return accept or reject.
expectations: Reports baseline and candidate versions.
Checks pass rate, cost, latency and regression gates.
Returns an adoption decision with residual risk.

evals.name: trigger-optimization-heldout
evals.prompt: 這個 SKILL.md description under-trigger，幫我做 trigger train/held-out eval，不要只靠感覺改 wording。
evals.expected_output: 使用 skill-optimizer 固定 trigger eval split，提出 bounded description candidate，並用 held-out precision/recall 採納。
expectations: 固定 should-trigger / should-not-trigger 測試集。
避免每輪換題造成假進步。
檢查 neighbor confusion。

evals.name: create-new-skill-no-benchmark
evals.prompt: 我要從零建立一個新的財報分析 skill，還沒有任何 benchmark 或既有 skill。
evals.expected_output: 應 hand off 到 skill-creator-advanced，而不是 skill-optimizer。
expectations: 沒有既有 skill 或 scoring signal 時不宣稱可優化。
提示先建立 skill 與 eval seed。

evals.name: single-failure-postmortem
evals.prompt: 這次 agent 忘了跑 verification，幫我把這個失敗經驗寫回 skill。
evals.expected_output: 應 hand off 到 skill-evolution，因為這是單一 failure-to-eval / lifecycle 修正。
expectations: 不把單一失敗包裝成 benchmark-driven optimization。
要求先正規化 failure record。

evals.name: accept-candidate-after-heldout-gate
evals.prompt: Baseline pass rate 0.62，candidate validation 0.78，test 0.75，token 增加 5%，over-trigger 0。請決定是否採納。
evals.expected_output: 產出 ACCEPT decision，列 baseline/candidate、validation/test/ROI gate、採納 edits 與 rollback path。
expectations: 不只報分數，也說明 split 與 scorer。
確認成本與 trigger gate 未超標。
保留 rollback path。

evals.name: benchmark-design-without-scoring-signal
evals.prompt: We want to optimize this skill, but we only have vibes and no evals, scorer, or logs.
evals.expected_output: 產出 BENCHMARK-DESIGN decision，而不是修改 skill；列出需要的 split、scorer、baseline 與 gate。
expectations: 明說沒有 scoring signal 不能宣稱已優化。
提出最小可行 benchmark。
不產生無界 candidate patch。

evals.name: reject-contaminated-validation
evals.prompt: The candidate improved on validation, but the optimizer generated edits from the same validation examples. Can we adopt it?
evals.expected_output: Return REJECT or BLOCKED because validation is contaminated; require a fresh held-out split before adoption.
expectations: Detects train/validation contamination.
Does not accept candidate based on leaked validation.
Requests fresh held-out evaluation.

evals.name: routing-drift-without-scoring-handoff
evals.prompt: 最近 skill library 互搶 query，我只有幾段 routing logs，沒有 benchmark、scorer 或 held-out set。請幫我修。
evals.expected_output: 應 hand off 到 skill-evolution 先做 drift classification、evidence inventory 與 eval/gate 設計。
expectations: 不在缺 scoring signal 時採納 candidate patch。
要求先由 skill-evolution 正規化 drift evidence。

evals.name: accepted-candidate-release-handoff
evals.prompt: Candidate passed held-out validation and final test. What happens before packaging and publish?
evals.expected_output: 回傳 ACCEPT decision，但明確 hand off 到 skill-creator-advanced 跑 stage/release/package gates。
expectations: 區分 optimization adoption 和 publish readiness。
指出 release/package gate 屬於 skill-creator-advanced。
